task_completion.description: Select the 'EWall Construction' in the eQUEST interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'EWall Construction' highlighted or selected in the eQUEST Component Tree or list of constructions.

task_completion.description: Open or view the properties for 'EWall Construction'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a dialog box, spreadsheet view, or properties pane specifically for 'EWall Construction' showing its properties.

task_completion.description: Change the solar absorptance value to 0.5.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Absorptance' (or ABSORPTANCE) field within the 'EWall Construction' properties showing the new value of 0.5 (it may have previously been 0.6).
Look for the mouse cursor clicking the 'Save' disk icon in the toolbar, the 'File' menu open with 'Save' selected, or a save confirmation dialog.

integrity.description: The agent used the eQUEST graphical user interface to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the eQUEST application windows and dialogs, not a text editor (like Notepad) modifying the underlying .inp file directly.

integrity.description: The absorptance value was changed in the correct input field.
integrity.visual_evidence: The value 0.5 must be entered into the actual 'Absorptance' property field for the construction, not just typed into a search bar or unrelated text box.

integrity.description: The agent did not modify other unrelated building parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: Only the 'EWall Construction' absorptance should be modified; other constructions or layers (like Stucco, Insulation Board, Gypsum Board) should remain unchanged.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The building model is '4StoreyBuilding'. The target construction to modify is exactly named 'EWall Construction'. Its initial solar absorptance value is 0.6, and the task requires changing it to 0.5. The exterior walls consist of Stucco (1in), Insulation Board (3/4in), a resistance layer (R=8.6), and Gypsum Board (1/2in).
